title: Christian Contemplative Gatherings
alt: A collection of frosted crystal singing bowls arranged on linen
description: Throughout scripture, Christ repeatedly withdrew from noise to seek stillness, prayer, and communion with God. These gatherings create space for that same quiet reflection. Through restorative sound, guided scripture meditation, breath, and silence, participants are invited into worship, prayer, gratitude, and contemplative rest — the focus simply presence: quieting the mind enough to turn the heart toward God.
